scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/web && npm run build -w packages/extension
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/web
scripts.build:extension: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/extension
scripts.package:extension: npm run build:extension && npm run package -w packages/extension
